description: Triggers a deployment for the configured application ID via the Dokploy API.
goal: Kick off a deployment for the target application.

task_template.title: Deploy Dokploy application
task_template.description: Deploy a specific Dokploy application after explicit deployment approval.

doc.summary: Run a deployment-oriented Dokploy scenario for one approved application.
doc.scope: One Dokploy application deployment identified by application_id.
doc.plan: Confirm deployment approval and credentials, invoke the deploy-application scenario, and record deployment status.
doc.verify_steps: Confirm deployment_status is returned and any Dokploy-side failure is recorded.
doc.rollback_plan: Use the project's deployment rollback process if the remote deployment succeeds but must be reverted.
doc.findings: Record missing approval, missing credentials, API errors, or remote deployment failures.
